        "A": "4, ['Requests for confirmation of the client’s maximum purchase ceiling or flexibility above budget (not a defined field for client budget confirmation)', 'Requests for the client’s total move/setup budget or expense limit (no field for explicit budget confirmation or limit disclosure)', 'References to lender coordination, rate locks, and pre-approval processes (no schema support for lender-side financing communication)', 'Mentions of bundling discounts or combined service offers (e.g., 10% discount if paired with other services) — not representable in fixed service fields']"

        "A": "14, ['Property listings with type, price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, taxes, maintenance fees, and features', 'Location and neighborhood details such as downtown, midtown, east end', 'Property financial details including estimated closing costs, property taxes, condo fees', 'Availability and move-in dates', 'Outdoor spaces such as balcony, private garden, patio', 'Parking types including underground and driveway', 'Condition rating and modern/updated features', 'Viewings offered (in-person or virtual) with available dates', 'Financing options with interest rate, down payment, term, and fees', 'Legal service packages with cost, service level, turnaround time, and included services', 'Moving service bundles with cost, level (standard/premium), included features (packing/unpacking)', 'Utility setup packages with type (basic/premium) and included services (internet, gas, water)', 'Timeline coordination for possession and move dates', 'Integration of property, legal, and moving details into a comprehensive service package summary']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 4, ['Requests for confirmation of the client’s maximum purchase ceiling or flexibility above budget (not a defined field for client budget confirmation)', 'Requests for the client’s total move/setup budget or expense limit (no field for explicit budget confirmation or limit disclosure)', 'References to lender coordination, rate locks, and pre-approval processes (no schema support for lender-side financing communication)', 'Mentions of bundling discounts or combined service offers (e.g., 10% discount if paired with other services) — not representable in fixed service fields']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 14, ['Property listings with type, price, size, bedrooms, bathrooms, taxes, maintenance fees, and features', 'Location and neighborhood details such as downtown, midtown, east end', 'Property financial details including estimated closing costs, property taxes, condo fees', 'Availability and move-in dates', 'Outdoor spaces such as balcony, private garden, patio', 'Parking types including underground and driveway', 'Condition rating and modern/updated features', 'Viewings offered (in-person or virtual) with available dates', 'Financing options with interest rate, down payment, term, and fees', 'Legal service packages with cost, service level, turnaround time, and included services', 'Moving service bundles with cost, level (standard/premium), included features (packing/unpacking)', 'Utility setup packages with type (basic/premium) and included services (internet, gas, water)', 'Timeline coordination for possession and move dates', 'Integration of property, legal, and moving details into a comprehensive service package summary']
